ingredients_text: Skinless Chicken Breast (62%) [ Chicken Breast (80%), Water, Maltodextrin, Dextrose, Salt, Acidity Regulator (Sodium Citrate), Stabiliser (Diphosphate, Triphosphate)]. BBQ Sauce (26%) [Sugar, Water, Tomato Puree, Vinegar, Unmodified Starch, Molasses, Salt, Smoked Water, Colour (E150a), Onion Powder, Spice (Coriander), Garlic Powder, Stabiliser (Xanthan Gum)]. Cheddar Cheese (6%) [Cheddar Cheese (Milk), Anticaking Agent (Potato Starch)]. Bacon(6%) [ Pork (88%), Water, Salt, Preservatives (Sodium Nitrite, Potassium Nitrite), Antioxidant (Sodium Ascorbate)].
